meanings.definition: force into some kind of situation, condition, or course of action
examples: They were swept up by the events
don't drag me into this business
The strong wind tousled my hair

meanings.definition: twist together or entwine into a confusing mass
highly complex or intricate and occasionally devious; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; - Sir Walter Scott
examples: Byzantine methods for holding on to his chairmanship
got his way by labyrinthine maneuvering
Oh, what a tangled web we weave
